title: strychnos nigrovillosa
intro: Strychnos nigrovillosa, also known as the black-villous strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its use as a purgative and to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos nigrovillosa include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Strychnos nigrovillosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can be found in some herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules.
